headline: How The Essex Property Trust (ESS) Narrative Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Converge
summary: Essex Property Trust’s updated analyst work now points to a fair value estimate of US$279.22, compared with the prior US$279.61, keeping the stock’s modeled worth in a very tight range. That small shift lines up with recent research where price targets cluster in the low to high US$270s, and ratings lean toward Neutral or only moderately positive as analysts balance execution risks with steady operations. As you read on, you will see how these price target tweaks fit into the broader,...
